# Execution Plan — Tenacious Conversion Engine
**Generated by Planner Agent | 2026-04-22**

---

## 1. Mission Statement

Build a production-grade multi-agent lead generation and conversion engine for Tenacious Consulting and Outsourcing that autonomously finds, qualifies, and converts B2B prospects into discovery calls — with full traceability, benchmark validation, and executive-ready reporting.

---

## 2. Dependency DAG

```
[Data Sources]
     │
     ├── Crunchbase ODM (1,001 records) ──────────────────────┐
     ├── layoffs.fyi CSV ─────────────────────────────────────┤
     ├── Public Job Posts (BuiltIn/Wellfound) ────────────────┤
     └── τ²-Bench (sierra-research/tau2-bench) ───────────────┤
                                                               ▼
[ACT I: Baseline]                                   [Enrichment Pipeline]
  τ²-Bench Harness                                    ├── Crunchbase lookup
  score_log.json ──────────────────────────────────── ├── Funding signal
  trace_log.jsonl                                      ├── Job-post velocity
  baseline.md                                          ├── Layoff detection
       │                                               ├── Leadership change
       ▼                                               └── AI maturity (0-3)
[ACT II: Production Stack]                                     │
  Email (Resend) ◄──────────────────────────── hiring_signal_brief.json
  SMS (Africa's Talking) ◄──────────────────── competitor_gap_brief.json
  HubSpot MCP ◄─────────────────────────────────────────────── │
  Cal.com Calendar ◄────────────────────────────────────────── │
  Outreach Generator                                            │
       │                                                        │
       ▼                                                        │
[ACT III: Adversarial Probing] ◄────────────────────────────── │
  30+ Structured Probes                                         │
  Failure Taxonomy                                              │
  Target Failure Mode (highest ROI)                             │
       │                                                        │
       ▼                                                        │
[ACT IV: Mechanism Improvement]                                 │
  Signal-Confidence-Aware Phrasing (primary mechanism)         │
  3 Ablation Variants                                           │
  Statistical Test (Delta A, p < 0.05)                         │
  held_out_traces.jsonl                                         │
       │                                                        │
       ▼                                                        │
[ACT V: Executive Memo]                                         │
  memo.pdf (2 pages)                                            │
  evidence_graph.json ◄──────────────────────────────────────── ┘
  README.md
       │
       ▼
[QA VALIDATION]
  final_validation_report.md
  All files verified
  All evidence references validated
```

---

## 3. Agent Assignments

| Agent | Acts | Primary Deliverables |
|-------|------|---------------------|
| Planner Agent | Pre-flight | execution_plan.md |
| Benchmark Agent | I, IV | score_log.json, trace_log.jsonl, baseline.md, ablation_results.json, held_out_traces.jsonl |
| Infrastructure Agent | II | Email/SMS/CRM/Calendar integrations, latency_metrics.json |
| Enrichment Agent | II | hiring_signal_brief.json, competitor_gap_brief.json |
| Outreach Agent | II | Email threads, SMS sequences, outreach_generator.py |
| CRM Agent | II | HubSpot records, audit logs |
| Probe Agent | III | probe_library.md, failure_taxonomy.md, target_failure_mode.md |
| Mechanism Agent | IV | method.md, ablation_results.json |
| Memo Agent | V | memo.pdf, evidence_graph.json |
| QA Agent | Post-V | final_validation_report.md |

---

## 4. Milestones

| Milestone | Target | Deliverable |
|-----------|--------|-------------|
| M0 — Pre-flight complete | Day 0 | All integrations verified |
| M1 — Act I baseline | Day 1 | score_log.json, baseline.md |
| M2 — Production stack live | Day 2-3 | End-to-end email+SMS+CRM+Cal |
| M3 — Enrichment pipeline | Day 3 | hiring_signal_brief.json, competitor_gap_brief.json |
| M4 — Adversarial probes | Day 4 | 30+ probes, target failure mode |
| M5 — Mechanism improvement | Day 5-6 | Delta A > 0, p < 0.05 |
| M6 — Executive memo | Day 6-7 | memo.pdf, evidence_graph.json |
| M7 — QA validation | Day 7 | final_validation_report.md |

---

## 5. ICP Segment Priority Matrix

| Segment | Signal Weight | Outbound Priority | Expected Reply Rate |
|---------|--------------|-------------------|---------------------|
| 1 — Series A/B (last 6 months) | Funding event HIGH | Tier 1 | 8-12% (signal-grounded) |
| 3 — Engineering leadership change | Leadership change HIGH | Tier 1 | 10-14% (narrow window) |
| 4 — Specialized capability gap | AI maturity ≥ 2 | Tier 2 | 7-10% |
| 2 — Mid-market restructuring | Layoff signal HIGH | Tier 2 | 6-9% |

---

## 6. Channel Hierarchy (enforced by all agents)

```
1. Email (primary) — cold outreach, signal-grounded
2. SMS (secondary) — warm leads who replied by email, scheduling only
3. Voice (bonus tier) — discovery call, human delivery lead
```

---

## 7. Cost Envelope

| Component | Budget | Actual Target |
|-----------|--------|---------------|
| Africa's Talking SMS | $0 | $0 |
| HubSpot Developer Sandbox | $0 | $0 |
| Cal.com self-hosted | $0 | $0 |
| Langfuse cloud | $0 | $0 |
| LLM dev tier (OpenRouter) | ≤$4 | $2.80 |
| LLM eval tier (Claude Sonnet 4.6) | ≤$12 | $8.40 |
| Total | ≤$20 | ~$11.20 |

---

## 8. Data Governance Checklist

- [x] No real Tenacious customer data used
- [x] All prospects are synthetic (derived from Crunchbase firmographics + fictitious contacts)
- [x] Kill-switch configured (LIVE_MODE=false by default)
- [x] All branded content marked 'draft' in metadata
- [x] Seed materials will be deleted from personal infrastructure post-challenge
- [x] Data-handling policy constraints enforced in code

---

## 9. Grading Observable Coverage

| Observable | Target Score | Strategy |
|------------|-------------|----------|
| Reproduction fidelity | 3/3 | Pin τ²-Bench model/settings; reproduce within 3 pp |
| Probe originality | 3/3 | Tenacious-specific probes: bench over-commitment, offshore-perception, segment misclassification |
| Mechanism attribution | 3/3 | Statistical test on sealed held-out; Delta A with p < 0.05 |
| Cost-quality Pareto | 3/3 | Cost per qualified lead under $5; track per trace |
| Evidence-graph integrity | 3/3 | Every claim in memo maps to trace_id or published source |
| Skeptic's appendix quality | 3/3 | Tenacious-specific risks: brand damage, bench mismatch, offshore perception |

**Target: 18/18 (Distinguished)**

---

## 10. Risk Register

| Risk | Probability | Mitigation |
|------|-------------|------------|
| τ²-Bench reproduction off by >3pp | Medium | Use pinned model; run 5 trials; report CI |
| Signal over-claiming causes brand damage | High | Confidence-aware phrasing mechanism (Act IV target) |
| Bench over-commitment | Medium | Hard constraint layer; handoff policy |
| ICP misclassification | Medium | Abstention classifier; confidence threshold |
| Cost exceeds $20 | Low | Dev/eval tier separation; Langfuse cost tracking |
| Multi-thread context leakage | Medium | Isolated conversation state per prospect |
